title: LIFF Link Portal
description: LINE Front-end Framework (LIFF) mini-app for LINE platform integration. Built with React, Vite, shadcn-ui, and React Query for seamless LINE ecosystem features.
longDescription: A LINE LIFF (LINE Front-end Framework) web application enabling LINE Mini App functionality. Built with React 18, Vite, and the shadcn-ui component library. Features include LINE authentication, data fetching via TanStack React Query, form validation with React Hook Form + Zod, Framer Motion animations, and Embla Carousel.
